zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Pyle於1560年出生在英國哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普時，她的父親Richard Pyle41歲，母親Phillis Bassett32歲。她於1585年6月20日與Thomas Kent在英國英格蘭哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1605年4月25日在英國英格蘭賀福爾亨廷頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Pyle于1560年出生在英国哈普爾奧維 瓦洛普时，她的父亲Richard Pyle41岁，母亲Phillis Bassett32岁。她于1585年6月20日与Thomas Kent在英国英格兰哈普爾瑟 瓦洛普结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1605年4月25日在英国英格兰賀福爾亨廷頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pile ‘stake, post’ (via Old English from Latin pilum ‘spike, javelin’), hence a topographic name for someone who lived near a stake or post serving as a landmark, or sometimes perhaps a nickname for a tall thin person.
Americanized form of Dutch Pijl: metonymic occupational name for a marksman or an arrowsmith, from pijl ‘arrow’.

variants.name: Pile
meanings: English (Devon and London): variant of   Pyle  .

French: from Old French pile ‘mortar, trough’ (from Latin pila), denoting a trough used for crushing or pounding various materials, such as lime, and in some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for someone engaged in such work.
French: topographic name from Old French pile ‘pillar, column’ (from Latin pila), or a habitational name from any of the minor places in northern France named with this word.

variants.name: Pyles
meanings: English: variant of Piles, itself a variant of Pyle with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Pyle was born in 1560, in Over Wallop, Hampshire, England, her father, Richard Pyle, was 41 and her mother, Phillis Bassett, was 32. She married Thomas Kent on 20 June 1585, in Nether Wallop, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 25 April 1605, in Huntington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Pyle è nata il nel 1560 nel Over Wallop, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Richard Pyle, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Phillis Bassett, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Kent il 20 giugno 1585, nel Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 25 aprile 1605, nel Huntington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Pyle(이)가 1560년 영국 함프실르 버 월로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Pyle(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Phillis Bassett(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1585년 6월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 네터 월로프에서 Thomas Kent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1605년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 헌틴그턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Pyle nasceu em 1560, em Over Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Pyle, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Phillis Bassett, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Kent em 20 de junho de 1585, em Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1605, em Huntington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.Upper Wallop, Hampshire, England: сомирс, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Pyle родилась в 1560 г. в местности овир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Pyle было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Phillis Bassett, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Kent 20 июня 1585 г. в местности нетир валлоп, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 25 апреля 1605 г. в местности хантингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

Se casó con Thomas Kent el 20 de junio de 1585, en Nether Wallop, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 25 de abril de 1605, en Huntington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
